description: This video explains inflation, its causes, and historical examples, including hyperinflation in Hungary after World War II. It discusses how Bitcoin may serve as a hedge against inflation due to its fixed supply.
topic_summary: Inflation is the sustained increase in prices of goods and services over time [t=20:08]. The video outlines two main causes: an increase in currency circulation [t=33:19] and supply shortages [t=47:03]. It also highlights the hyperinflation of the Hungarian Penge post-World War II [t=63:47] and discusses Bitcoin as a potential solution to inflation [t=121:45].
